name: Mishorim Real Estate Investments Ltd
summary: Mishorim Real Estate Investments Ltd engages in the investment, development, rental, and sale of real estate assets, hotels, and resorts in Canada, Israel, and the United States. Its portfolio also covers commercial and office buildings, and shopping centers. Mishorim Real Estate Investments Ltd was founded in 1990 and is based in Bnei Brak, Israel.
